fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the number of the troubleshooting.
The program copies the number from the No. field in the Troubleshooting Header table when you insert a troubleshooting line.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the number of the line.
The program numbers the lines sequentially and uses the numbers to keep track of the different troubleshooting lines.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies the troubleshooting comment or guidelines.
